debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G : Graph α β
M : Set β
h : @Graph.IsMaxMatching α β G M
⊢ M.encard = @Graph.MatchingNumber α β G

proof:
apply le_antisymm
  · exact h.toIsMatching.encard_le
  · refine sSup_le ?_
    rintro n ⟨M', hM', rfl⟩
    exact h.max M' hM'
failed_attempts:
apply le_antisymm
  · simpa [MatchingNumber] using le_csSup (by
      refine ⟨M.encard, ?_⟩
      refine ⟨M, h.toIsMatching, rfl⟩) (by
      refine ⟨M, h.toIsMatching, rfl⟩)
  · refine csSup_le ?_
    rintro n ⟨M', hM', rfl⟩
    exact h.max M' hM'

have hle : M.encard ≤ ν(G) := h.toIsMatching.encard_le
  have hge : ν(G) ≤ M.encard := by
    refine sSup_le ?_
    rintro n ⟨M', hM', rfl⟩
    exact h.max M' hM'
  exact le_antisymm_iff.mp ⟨hle, hge⟩

have hle : M.encard ≤ ν(G) := h.toIsMatching.encard_le
  have hge : ν(G) ≤ M.encard := by
    refine sSup_le ?_
    rintro n ⟨M', hM', rfl⟩
    exact h.max M' hM'
  exact le_antisymm_iff.mp ⟨hle, hge⟩

apply le_antisymm
  · exact le_csSup (by
      refine ⟨M.encard, ?_⟩
      refine ⟨M, h.toIsMatching, rfl⟩)
  · exact IsMatching.encard_le h.toIsMatching

refine le_antisymm ?_ (h.toIsMatching.encard_le)
  have := h.max M h.toIsMatching
  simpa using this

apply le_antisymm
  · have : ν(G) ≤ M.encard := by
      refine sSup_le ?_
      rintro n ⟨M', hM', rfl⟩
      exact h.max M' hM'
    exact this
  · exact IsMatching.encard_le h.toIsMatching

refine le_antisymm ?_ ?_
  · exact hM.encard_le (G := G) (M := M) h.toIsMatching
  · simpa [MatchingNumber] using h.max M h.toIsMatching

apply le_antisymm
  · exact (h.toIsMatching.encard_le)
  · simpa using h.max M h.toIsMatching

apply le_antisymm_iff.mp
  refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
  · exact h.toIsMatching.encard_le
  ·
    refine sSup_le ?_
    rintro n ⟨M', hM', rfl⟩
    exact h.max M' hM'

apply le_antisymm
  · exact (le_csSup (by
      refine ⟨M.encard, ?_⟩
      refine ⟨M, h.toIsMatching, rfl⟩))
  · refine csSup_le ?_
    rintro n ⟨M', hM', rfl⟩
    exact h.max M' hM'

refine le_antisymm ?_ ?_
  ·
    refine le_csSup ?_ ?_
    ·
      refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
      refine ⟨∅, ?_, rfl⟩
      refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
      · intro e he
        cases he
      · intro e he f hf hne
        cases he
    ·
      rintro n ⟨M', hM', rfl⟩
      exact h.max M' hM'
  · exact IsMatching.encard_le (G := G) (M := M) h.toIsMatching

apply le_antisymm
  · simpa [MatchingNumber] using (le_csSup (by
      refine ⟨M.encard, ?_⟩
      refine ⟨M, h.toIsMatching, rfl⟩))
  · exact h.toIsMatching.encard_le

apply le_antisymm
  ·
    have hs : ν(G) ≤ M.encard := by
      refine sSup_le ?_
      rintro n ⟨M', hM', rfl⟩
      exact h.max M' hM'
    exact hs
  · exact h.toIsMatching.encard_le

apply le_antisymm
  · exact h.toIsMatching.encard_le
  · have := h.max M h.toIsMatching
    simpa using this

apply le_antisymm
  · exact h.toIsMatching.encard_le
  · simpa using h.max M h.toIsMatching

apply le_antisymm
  · exact h.toIsMatching.encard_le
  · simpa using h.max M h.toIsMatching

apply le_antisymm
  · exact h.toIsMatching.encard_le
  · simpa [MatchingNumber] using h.max M h.toIsMatching

apply le_antisymm
  · simpa [ν, MatchingNumber] using le_csSup (by
      refine ⟨M.encard, ?_⟩
      refine ⟨M, h.toIsMatching, rfl⟩)
  · exact csSup_le (by
      rintro n ⟨M', hM', rfl⟩
      exact h.max M' hM')

apply le_antisymm
  · exact h.toIsMatching.encard_le
  ·
    rcases Classical.eq_or_ne M.encard 0 with h0 | h0
    · simpa [h0] using (zero_le (ν(G)))
    ·
      have hmem : M.encard ∈ {n | ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ n = M.encard} := by
        refine ⟨M, h.toIsMatching, rfl⟩
      exact le_csSup (by
        refine ⟨M.encard, hmem⟩) hmem

apply le_antisymm
  · exact le_csSup (by
      refine ⟨M.encard, ?_⟩
      refine ⟨M, h.toIsMatching, rfl⟩)
  · refine csSup_le ?_
    rintro n ⟨M', hM', rfl⟩
    exact h.max M' hM'

apply le_antisymm
  · simpa [MatchingNumber] using le_csSup (by
      refine ⟨M.encard, ?_⟩
      refine ⟨M, h.toIsMatching, rfl⟩)
  · exact IsMatching.encard_le h.toIsMatching

apply le_antisymm
  · exact le_csSup (by
      refine ⟨M.encard, ?_⟩
      refine ⟨M, h.toIsMatching, rfl⟩)
  · rcases le_csSup_iff.1 (le_rfl : ν(G) ≤ ν(G)) with ⟨n, hn, hnle⟩
    rcases hn with ⟨M', hM', rfl⟩
    exact (h.max M' hM').trans hnle

apply le_antisymm
  · exact h.toIsMatching.encard_le
  · have hs : ν(G) ∈ {n | ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ n = M.encard} := by
      classical
      rcases (exists_eq_iSup' (s := {n | ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ n = M.encard})) with ⟨n, hn, rfl⟩
      exact hn
    rcases hs with ⟨M', hM', rfl⟩
    exact h.max M' hM'
successful_attempts:
apply le_antisymm
  · exact h.toIsMatching.encard_le
  · refine sSup_le ?_
    rintro n ⟨M', hM', rfl⟩
    exact h.max M' hM'

apply le_antisymm
  · exact h.toIsMatching.encard_le
  · refine sSup_le ?_
    rintro n ⟨M', hM', rfl⟩
    exact h.max M' hM'

apply le_antisymm
  · exact h.toIsMatching.encard_le
  · refine sSup_le ?_
    rintro n ⟨M', hM', rfl⟩
    exact h.max M' hM'

apply le_antisymm
  · exact h.toIsMatching.encard_le
  · refine sSup_le ?_
    rintro n ⟨M', hM', rfl⟩
    exact h.max M' hM'

apply le_antisymm
  · simpa using (h.toIsMatching.encard_le)
  ·
    rcases h with ⟨hM, hmax⟩
    refine sSup_le ?_
    rintro n ⟨M', hM', rfl⟩
    simpa using (hmax M' hM')

apply le_antisymm
  · exact h.toIsMatching.encard_le
  ·
    refine sSup_le ?_
    rintro n ⟨M', hM', rfl⟩
    exact h.max M' hM'

apply le_antisymm
  · exact h.toIsMatching.encard_le
  · refine sSup_le ?_
    rintro n ⟨M', hM', rfl⟩
    exact h.max M' hM'

apply le_antisymm
  · exact h.toIsMatching.encard_le
  ·
    refine sSup_le ?_
    rintro n ⟨M', hM', rfl⟩
    exact h.max M' hM'

apply le_antisymm
  · exact h.toIsMatching.encard_le
  · refine sSup_le ?_
    rintro n ⟨M', hM', rfl⟩
    exact h.max M' hM'
